cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The user wants me to figure out the best title for the passage provided. The options are A through D. First, I'll read through the passage again to get the main idea. The passage is about Will Steger, a polar explorer and environmentalist, leading a team on a dogsled trip in the Arctic to show the effects of global warming. They're documenting their journey online, and Steger is concerned about the changes in the Arctic due to climate change. Now, looking at the options: A) The Arctic Is In Danger B) Discoveries of the Arctic C) Sledding Through the Arctic D) Consequences of Global Warming The passage is centered around global warming and its effects on the Arctic. While the expedition is a dogsled trip (which might relate to option C), the main purpose is to highlight the consequences of climate change. The article mentions Steger's environmental activism and the changes they expect to see because of global warming. So the focus isn't just on the Arctic being in danger, but more on the consequences of the warming itself. Option D seems to directly address the main theme of the passage. Option A is a bit vague and doesn't specify the cause, which the passage clearly points to as global warming. Option C is more about the activity rather than the purpose. Option B talks
